benefits.description: Weight loss effect noted, but long-standing stall on current dose

protocol_notes: Taking Tirzepatide since April 2024, currently at 15mg. Uses kratom regularly (1 teaspoon morning, 1 teaspoon mid-afternoon, occasionally a third). Also takes Vyvanse for ADHD. No observed liver elevation on regular leaf kratom. No reduction in kratom use observed with Tirzepatide. Did notice reduced kratom use when starting Vyvanse. Plans to stack Retatrutide if current Tirzepatide dose doesn't break weight loss stall.
